## 🏠 Home Page (/)

### AI Training & Workshops for Schools, Corporate & Individuals

Learn, Create and Grow with AI. We deliver practical, hands-on AI education that transforms how you work, learn, and build.

- **Primary CTA**: Book Free Demo
- **Secondary CTA**: Explore Programs
- **Trust Line**: Trusted by Leading Institutions — Empowering the next generation of innovators

### Key Statistics (Home)
- 500+ Students Trained
- 50+ Workshops Done
- 4 Programs
- 98% Satisfaction Rate

### 4 Program Funnels

1. **Schools** — AI Awareness Workshops for students & teachers → /schools
2. **Corporate** — AI Productivity & Automation for teams → /corporate
3. **Individuals** — Learn AI Skills — No Coding Required → /individuals
4. **Business Owners** — Use AI to Grow Your Business Faster → /business

### What Makes Us Different
1. **100% Practical** — No boring PowerPoints. Live AI demonstrations and hands-on activities.
2. **Customized Content** — Every workshop is tailored to the audience.
3. **Immediate Results** — Participants start using AI tools from Day 1.
4. **Expert Led** — 15+ years of experience in AI and technology.
5. **Post-Workshop Support** — Continued guidance and resources after the workshop.
6. **Affordable & Scalable** — Programs designed for all budget levels.

### Industry Statistics
- 85% of jobs will be AI-impacted by 2030
- 97% of students lack AI skills
- 3x productivity boost with AI
- 1 hour to get started

### Testimonials (Home)
- "The AI workshop was absolutely transformative for our students." — Principal, Leading School, Maharashtra
- "Our team saved 2-3 hours daily after implementing the AI tools." — HR Manager, IT Company, Pune
- "I started freelancing with AI tools right after the course. Within 2 months, ₹30K+/month." — Saurabh K., Individual Learner

## 🏫 Schools Page (/schools)

### Prepare Your Students for the AI Future in Just 1 Hour

Interactive AI Awareness Workshop — practical, engaging & future-ready. Give your students the skills that matter most in tomorrow's world.

- **Primary CTA**: Book Free Demo Session
- **Secondary CTA**: Watch Demo
- **Trust Line**: Trusted by Leading Schools

### The Challenge: Are Your Students Ready for the AI Era?

1. **AI is Transforming Every Career** — Students without AI literacy risk falling behind.
2. **Students Consume Tech, But Don't Create** — They lack skills to harness tech as creators.
3. **Traditional Education Lacks AI Exposure** — Critical gap in student readiness.

### Statistics (Schools)
- 85% of jobs AI-impacted by 2030
- 97% of students lack AI skills
- 60% of current jobs didn't exist 20 years ago
- 1 hour is all it takes to start

### What Students Learn
1. **Generate AI Images** — Create stunning visuals from text descriptions.
2. **Create Videos in Seconds** — Transform ideas into professional videos.
3. **Build Websites Without Coding** — AI builds websites from simple instructions.
4. **Understand App Creation** — See the process from idea to prototype.
5. **Create Music with AI** — AI-generated music and sounds.
6. **AI for Studies & Careers** — Enhance academic performance, explore AI careers.

### Workshop Flow (60 Minutes)
| Step | Title | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 01 | AI Basics | Introduction to AI concepts in simple, engaging language |
| 02 | Live Demo | Real-time AI tool demonstrations that amaze and inspire |
| 03 | Student Interaction | Hands-on activities where students try AI tools |
| 04 | Career Guidance | Future career paths and opportunities in the AI era |

> "From curiosity to clarity in just 60 minutes"

### Student Testimonials
- "I never knew AI could do so many things! The image generation part blew my mind." — Student, Class 10, Pune
- "This workshop was amazing! I built a website using AI in just 2 minutes." — Student, Class 12, Mumbai
- "Our students were engaged from start to finish. Aligned perfectly with NEP 2020." — Principal, CBSE School

### Benefits for Schools
1. **Enhances School Reputation** — Position as innovative, future-ready institution
2. **Future-Ready Students** — Equip with skills for tomorrow's workplace
3. **High Engagement** — Interactive format keeps students excited
4. **Practical Exposure** — Hands-on experience with real-world AI tools
5. **NEP 2020 Goals** — Supports digital education transformation
6. **Easy to Schedule** — Just 1 hour, fits any school schedule

### Lead Form (Schools)
- Name (required)
- Phone (required)
- School / College Name

## 🏢 Corporate Page (/corporate)

### Save 2–3 Hours Daily Using AI

AI Productivity Workshop for Teams — automate repetitive tasks, boost output, and transform how your team works. Practical, hands-on, results-driven.

- **Primary CTA**: Book Corporate Demo
- **Secondary CTA**: See Curriculum
- **Trust Line**: Trusted by Leading Companies — ROI visible within the first week

### The Problem: Your Team is Losing Hours Every Day

1. **Hours Wasted on Manual Tasks** — Writing emails, creating reports, scheduling — tasks AI handles in seconds.
2. **Slow Content & Report Creation** — Teams spend days on work AI can do in minutes.
3. **Repetitive Workflows** — No automation means no scale.

### Statistics (Corporate)
- 2-3 hours saved daily per person
- 3x productivity boost
- 10x faster content creation
- 1 week to see ROI

### Workshop Curriculum
1. **Email Automation** — Write professional emails 10x faster.
2. **Reports & Presentations** — Generate data reports and pitch decks in minutes.
3. **Content Creation** — Blog posts, social media, marketing copy at scale.
4. **Meeting & Task Management** — AI-powered meeting notes and project tracking.
5. **Research & Analysis** — Market research and competitor analysis in minutes.
6. **Workflow Automation** — Automate repetitive processes across departments.

### Why Companies Choose Us
1. **Save Massive Time** — 2-3 hours saved per person, per day. 50+ hours per team per month.
2. **Increase Output** — 3x more output without burning out your team.
3. **Stay Competitive** — Companies using AI outperform those that don't.
4. **Customized for Your Team** — Tailored to your industry and use cases.
5. **Zero Disruption** — 1-2 hour sessions that fit around work schedules.
6. **Post-Training Support** — 30-day support after the workshop.

### Process
| Step | Title | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 01 | Discovery Call | Understand your team's challenges and customize |
| 02 | Live Workshop | Interactive, hands-on session with real AI tools |
| 03 | Implementation | Team starts using AI tools with playbooks |
| 04 | Follow-Up Support | 30-day support for adoption and questions |

## 👤 Individuals Page (/individuals)

### Learn AI Skills That Give You an Advantage

Beginner-friendly, no coding needed. Master AI tools that help you create, earn, and grow in your career — all with step-by-step guidance.

- **Primary CTA**: Enroll Now
- **Secondary CTA**: See What You'll Learn
- **Trust Line**: Join 5,000+ Learners — No coding background required

### Why Learn AI Now
- 85% of jobs will need AI skills by 2030
- 40% higher salary for AI-skilled workers
- 10x faster content creation with AI
- Zero coding knowledge required

### AI Skills Taught
1. **AI Image Generation** — Midjourney, DALL-E for visuals, logos, product images.
2. **AI Video Creation** — Professional videos, reels, presentations in minutes.
3. **AI Content Writing** — Blogs, social media, emails, marketing copy 10x faster.
4. **AI Website Building** — Build complete websites, no coding.
5. **ChatGPT & AI Tools Mastery** — Prompt engineering for 10x better AI output.
6. **AI Freelancing & Earning** — Monetize AI skills through freelancing and services.

### Who Is This For
- ✓ College students wanting an edge
- ✓ Working professionals upskilling
- ✓ Freelancers adding AI services
- ✓ Career changers entering AI
- ✓ Content creators scaling output
- ✓ Anyone curious about AI

### Learning Path
| Step | Title | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 01 | Watch Free Intro | Get a taste of what AI can do — completely free |
| 02 | Enroll in Course | Choose the course that fits your goals and budget |
| 03 | Learn & Practice | Step-by-step lessons with hands-on projects |
| 04 | Start Earning | Apply your skills to freelance, create, or land a job |

### Success Stories
- "I started with zero knowledge and now earning ₹30K/month creating AI content." — Rahul S., Freelancer, Pune
- "The course is so simple and practical. I use AI everyday now." — Priya K., Student, Mumbai
- "I was scared of AI but this course made it so easy." — Amit T., Professional, Bangalore

### Available Courses
- AI Basics — Zero to Hero (₹499)
- AI Prompt Engineering (₹699)
- AI Se Kamao — Earn with AI (₹2,999)
- AI Freelancing Masterclass (₹1,499)
- AI Trading Mastery (₹2,999)

## 💼 Business Page (/business)

### Use AI to Grow Your Business Faster

AI-powered marketing, content creation, lead generation & business automation. Stop doing everything manually — let AI supercharge your growth.

- **Primary CTA**: Book Strategy Call
- **Secondary CTA**: See AI Solutions
- **Trust Line**: For Smart Business Owners — Scale without scaling costs

### The Challenge: Everything Is Manual

1. **Marketing Takes Too Long** — Social media, ads, content creation is exhausting and slow.
2. **Leads Aren't Converting** — Without smart follow-ups and personalization, losing customers daily.
3. **Operations Are Inefficient** — Repetitive tasks and lack of automation eat into profits.

### Statistics (Business)
- 10x faster content creation
- 50% reduction in marketing cost
- 3x more leads generated
- 70% of tasks automatable with AI

### AI Solutions for Business
1. **Marketing Automation** — AI-generated social media, ad copy, email campaigns on autopilot.
2. **Content Creation** — Blog posts, product descriptions, website copy in minutes.
3. **Lead Generation** — AI-powered lead magnets, chatbots, and funnels 24/7.
4. **Customer Support AI** — Chatbots that handle queries without hiring staff.
5. **Business Intelligence** — AI analytics, competitor monitoring, market insights.
6. **Operations Automation** — Automate invoicing, scheduling, reporting.

### Benefits for Business Owners
1. **Reduce Costs** — Save ₹50K-₹2L per month on operations.
2. **Increase Revenue** — More leads, better marketing, faster content = more sales.
3. **Save Massive Time** — Automate 70% of repetitive tasks.
4. **Scale Without Scaling Costs** — Grow output 10x without proportional expenses.
5. **Stay Ahead of Competition** — Businesses using AI outperform those that don't.
6. **Hands-On Guidance** — We help implement AI in your specific business context.

### Process
| Step | Title | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 01 | Strategy Call | Understand your business, challenges, and goals |
| 02 | AI Audit | Identify which tasks can be automated with AI |
| 03 | Implementation | Set up AI tools and train your team |
| 04 | Growth & Support | Ongoing support to optimize and scale |

### Business Testimonials
- "Marketing costs dropped by 60% and leads increased by 3x." — Vikram M., E-commerce Owner
- "I used to spend ₹50K/month on content. Now AI does it for free." — Neha P., Restaurant Chain Owner
- "AI chatbot handles 80% of customer queries automatically." — Deepak R., Service Business Owner

## FAQ

### What is the AI Awareness Workshop?
A 1-hour interactive session for school and college students covering AI basics, live demonstrations, hands-on activities, and career guidance.

### How long is the workshop?
60 minutes standard. Extended versions (90 min or half-day) available on request.

### What do students learn?
AI image generation, video creation, website building, app creation, music generation, and AI career guidance.

### Is the demo session free?
Yes, limited free demo sessions are available each month. Contact: +91 8007280721.

### What is the corporate workshop?
A hands-on AI productivity workshop teaching teams email automation, content creation, report generation, workflow automation — saving 2-3 hours per day.

### Do I need coding knowledge?
No. All programs are designed for beginners with zero coding or technical background.

### What courses are available for individuals?
AI Basics (₹499), Prompt Engineering (₹699), AI Se Kamao (₹2,999), AI Freelancing (₹1,499), AI Trading Mastery (₹2,999).

### How does AI help my business?
AI automates marketing, content, lead generation, customer support, and operations — reducing costs by up to 50% and increasing leads by 3x.
